lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Hello [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: So, you want to be on the Nice List huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If that's what it takes to get into that pub, absolutely.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: That's the spirit.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: So let me tell you about the first game.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: There are other non-player ch... I mean competitors in here, who will also be trying to offload their coal.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Simply pick up the coal and hand it out to your opponents to eliminate them.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: The large piles contain 40 pieces of coal. The small piles contain 20 pieces of coal.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Be careful not to carry too much or you might get caught out and eliminated.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Are you ready to start the first game?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I want to take a look around first.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Fair enough, I'll be waiting!

lines.speaker: Santa's Scribe
lines.text: Congrats on winning the game! You've done a smashing job!

lines.speaker: Santa's Scribe
lines.text: Come and speak to me when you're ready to advance to the next game.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: A riddle.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Their body is round, with a carrot for a nose. They love to be cold, from their head to their toes.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: That's not quite right, I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Their body is round, with a carrot for a nose. They love to be cold, from their head to their toes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Snowman?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Brilliant! On to the next challenge!

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Amazing job in my game [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you enjoy being a host in these games?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: It's jolly good fun. Part of me wishes I could join in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you get anything for being a host?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: A free pass onto the Nice List!

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Plus I'm very judgemental so the job is quite fitting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's your story? How did you end up here?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Well, before all this I was a Judge in a very prestigious court.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's very fitting.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Indeed.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: I loved all the opportunities to help people in Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Alas, that was a long time ago. I've since passed away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, you're dead?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Oh we all are here! Santa gave us the opportunity to stay here in this sanctuary.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you don't look particularly ghostly, or zombie-like?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: That's just the thing, while we are in here we can keep our mortal body with Santa's magic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Amazing, but also kind of scary at the same time.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Where did you think the ghosts of Christmas past, present and future go?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: To the pub of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you happen to know if I'm on the Naughty List or Nice List?

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Let me see...

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Looks like you are on the...

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Naughty List... That's unfortunate.

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: Nice List! Congratulations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy Holidays!

lines.speaker: Santa's scribe
lines.text: You too [player name].
